title: Better Chest Loot
description: This adds better chest loot for all the structures in the game! like dreams better drops mod, but more balanced and fair!
body:
Welcome to the **Better Chest Loot** Mod! this mod overall tweaks chest loot by having a custom GUI to change it to your liking!

**--GUI Features--**

- Has a bar for every single chest loot table in the game
- The customization goes up to 10x the normal luck for chest loot
- To activate the GUI, click G
- Might cause conflicts with other mod keybinds in modpacks you make, since the keybind for this is G

**Made by MaceMeta**
